questions.question_text: Answer the following questions CO Mapping a What were the 3 main divisions of Islamic architecture styles in India? 2.5 b Name 2 mosques built under the Pronvincial Islamic architecture in India. 2.5 c Name 5 Indian cities having historically and religiously significant river ghats. 2.5 d Name 5 typology of buildings under the Mughals in India with examples 2.5 e In which city and country of Europe did Renaissance start in Europe? 2.5 f Name 2 examples of Lucknavi Nawabi architecture. 2.5 g List three character of Baroque style in architecture. 2.5 h Name 2 important architects who are considered masters of Renaissance in Europe. 2.5
Draw neat labelled sketches to explain the architectural design, of Mosque under the Mughals in India, under whom the mosque design in India had reached its most mature phase. 10
Taking Mosques and Temples as prototype, briefly enlist any 5 fundamental differences between the Islamic and Hindu architecture styles. 10
List the chronology of sultanates in India along with any one specific architectural contribution from that dynasty. 10
List the chronology of Mughal emperors in India with any one specific architectural contribution from or in the name of that emperor. 10
Describe and briefly explain any 5 examples of Lucknavi nawabi architecture. 10
Describe 5 main features of Renaissance style and name any 5 Renaissance buildings of repute surviving in Europe till the present times. 10
What was the influence of colonialism on the architecture of India with respect to the evolution of new building/architectural typologies and their uses? 10
Describe & Explain any 5 colonial architecture in India. OR Write a brief essay on the relevance of colonial architecture in Indian architecture paradigm with atleast 5 suitable examples. 10
